drafts.subject: Fewer missed calls at Acme HVAC
drafts.body:
Hi,

I saw reviewers mention scheduling delays during busy weeks. We help HVAC teams automate dispatch and reminders.

Open to a 10-minute call?

Best

drafts.subject: Quick win for your dispatch desk
drafts.body:
Hi,

Teams like Acme HVAC use us to cut scheduling friction when call volume spikes. Worth a short intro?

Thanks

smartEmails.crmContextUsed: We sell field-service scheduling SaaS for HVAC contractors.
